full_text:
Yuan Hong (Xiafu) 袁閎 (夏輔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Hong (袁閎), styledXiafu (夏輔), was born in Runan. Rebuked his relatives for prospering when the Han was in disorder, the Turbans respected him. Yuan Hong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
